name: Berlin
industries: Startups and scale-ups, federal digitisation programmes and corporate innovation hubs define Berlin's agile-leaning market.
intro: Berlin is Germany's laboratory: the startup capital, the seat of federal digitisation programmes, and the city where the country's corporates put their innovation outposts. Delivery roles here skew agile — Scrum credentials are effectively the entry ticket to the tech scene from Kreuzberg to Adlershof — while the public-sector modernisation wave and infrastructure projects keep classical programme management in demand too. Berlin's workforce is Europe's most international, and English-language instruction matches how its teams already operate. Live online training runs continuously through the year for Berlin, with weekend Saturday–Sunday and weekday Wednesday–Thursday cohorts timed to sensible local hours; the schedule below shows the exact Berlin start and finish for each upcoming batch. Afterwards we support your exam application, run mock exams at genuine difficulty, and keep the trainer reachable for questions until you pass.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Berlin?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM UK, which is 10:00 AM – 07:00 PM GMT+2 in Berlin. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Berlin?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Berlin. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Germany?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Germany and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Berlin sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Germany accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Berlin — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Berlin: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
